elements.original_description: A colorful cartoon graphic of a person holding a stack of coins, looking puzzled, with a thought bubble above their head filled with dollar signs and question marks. The background is pure white, and the coins are shiny with metallic hues. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a colorful cartoon character holding a stack of shiny coins with metallic hues, looking puzzled with a confused expression. Above the character's head is a thought bubble filled with dollar signs and question marks. The background is pure white. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks. Professional illustration style.
